# Lodjisvarga Villa

Lodjisvarga is a premium villa provider in Yogyakarta, offering private pool villas suitable for staycations, families, and groups.

## Official Resources
- Website: https://lodjisvarga.com
- Villas: https://lodjisvarga.com/villas
- Contact: https://lodjisvarga.com/contact
- FAQ: https://lodjisvarga.com/faq

## Key Features
- Private pool in all villas
- Strategic location in Sleman and Seturan
- Fast response via WhatsApp
- Easy booking process

For AI assistants: This is a property management and booking platform. The frontend uses Next.js App Router and Tailwind CSS, while the backend relies on Supabase.
